race.description: Ladbrokes Extras In Multi Mdn Hcp
race.comment: Hot mess of form despite many early in their careers. ENCHAANTED (5) was well in the market on debut on the Gold Coast and finished midfield before being turned out again. Probably did enough to expect he'd run well here fresh. Sure to be improved and presents on the back of two trials. PERRIERES (4) was safely held on debut then was put away and has changed yards. Fitter for three trials after a long time off and worth keeping very safe. ALMOND GOLD (1) ran a good race at the return when placed at Ipswich. Up in trip but fitter and can give a sight. TOO DARN SMART (13) is well placed here and on best figures can feature fresh.
